criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Specific numeric result (91% false-positive rate, 9% posterior); falsifiable stake.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs build cleanly. Minor: rung 3 isolation feels like a half-step.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Full expanded formula with each component explained.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Almost every symbol defined. Minor: 'mutually exclusive' undefined.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Tree, Venn, bar all specific. Minor: Venn at center overlaps tree at left-half.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Selective erase at t=182 leaves cluttered numeric region. Venn never erased.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three distinct draws plus writes/highlights. Well-suited to topic.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: All formulas correct; arithmetic verified; 91% false-positive consistent with 1-0.09=0.91.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: 12 beats / 210s averages 17s/beat. Single idea per beat. 25s gap from t=105 to t=130.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Proportionality insight stated 4 times across payoff/destination/beat/board.

topThreeIssues: Selective erase at t=182 leaves four numeric write targets in center-right and top-right cluttering during proportionality close
Venn diagram at t=55 in center never erased; competes spatially with tree in left-half and joint-factoring in center-right
'Mutually exclusive' introduced at law-of-total-probability beat without definition for intro audience
summary: High-quality plan: concrete payoff, clean six-rung staircase, precise destination, arithmetically correct worked example. Main weaknesses are board-management issues in the second half - partial erase leaves numeric clutter, Venn never cleared. Math and pedagogy are sound.
